title: groov e Wireless Full-Size Keyboard - Computer Accessories for Laptops and PCs, Ergonomic Design, Silent Keys, 2.4G Wireless Connection, Qwerty Keyboard - Black
features: WIRELESS KEYBOARD - Upgrade your computing setup with the Groov-e Wireless Keyboard and redefine how you work and play; elevate your typing experience with a touch of modern convenience
PLUG & PLAY - Made to meet the standards of modern convenience, this keyboard uses a USB receiver to connect to your PC or laptop; there are no hassles, setups or installs, simply plug and play
ERGONOMIC DESIGN - This computer accessory offers an ergonomic design to provide users with a comfortable and versatile experience for optimal performance
FULL-SIZED KEYBOARD - The keyboard is a full-sized qwerty keyboard to offer accurate typing while the quiet keys let you work with a minimal amount of excess noise

RELIABLE CONNECTION - The computer peripheral uses a 2.4G wireless connection to ensure you have an uninterrupted and reliable connection that avoids any input delays and provides high-speed communication between your PC and the input device
description: From the manufacturer Qwerty Full-Size Keyboard The full-sized QWERTY keyboard offers precise typing with quiet keys for minimal noise. Plug and Play This keyboard offers easy plug-and-play connectivity with an integrated USB cable, requiring no setup or installation. 2.4G Wireless Connection The 2.4G wireless connection offers stable, cable-free communication between your device and computer.
